title: Deliciously Buttery American Scallion Sandwich
description: A buttery, crispy American dish featuring scallions and double-rise bread, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and low-sodium friendly.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat.
Butter one side of each bread slice.
Place two slices of bread, buttered side down, in the skillet.
Top each bread slice with a quarter of the sliced scallions, a pinch of salt-free seasoning blend, and a few grinds of black pepper.
Sprinkle a pinch of garlic powder over the scallions.
Place the remaining bread slices, buttered side up, on top of the scallions.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the bread is golden brown and the scallions are softened.
Carefully flip the sandwiches over and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the other side is also golden brown.
